title: Secret Symbols of the Rosicrucians
artist: Unknown / attributed to the Rosicrucian tradition
description: 17 symbolic plates from the Secret Symbols of the Rosicrucians tradition. Charts of cosmic correspondences, the alchemical process as spiritual transformation, the Tree of Life, the celestial spheres, and the hermetic macrocosm. These plates synthesize alchemical, kabbalistic, and hermetic symbolism into a single visual system of correspondences.
notes: 17 plates. These are the most synthetic visual works — they map the entire hermetic cosmos in a single image. Useful as cover art or section dividers for alchemy/hermetic content.
